features.title: No Watermark
features.desc: Clean video without the TikTok logo burned in.

features.title: MP3 Audio
features.desc: Extract and save just the audio track.

faq.q: How do I download a TikTok video without watermark?
faq.a: Open TikTok, tap Share on any video, then Copy Link. Paste the link above and click Download. Choose "HD · No Watermark" to save a clean video without the TikTok logo burned in.

faq.q: Is TokDown free to use?
faq.a: Yes — completely free with no registration, no account, and no download limits. We have no hidden fees or premium plans.

faq.q: Can I download TikTok audio as MP3?
faq.a: Yes. After fetching the video you will see an "Audio MP3" button to save only the sound track. Useful for TikTok sounds, background music, and voiceovers.

faq.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a: Yes. TokDown is a web app — open it in Safari (iPhone), Chrome (Android), or any modern browser. No app install needed.

faq.q: How do I save a TikTok video to my iPhone camera roll?
faq.a: After downloading, the video saves to your Files app. Open Files, find the video, tap Share, then "Save Video" to move it to your Camera Roll.

faq.q: How do I save a TikTok video on Android?
faq.a: Tap the download button and the video saves directly to your Downloads folder. Open it in your Gallery app from there.

faq.q: Why can't I download a private TikTok video?
faq.a: Private videos require login authentication that we cannot access. Only public TikTok videos are downloadable. If the video is public and still failing, the creator may have disabled downloads in their settings.

faq.q: What video quality is available?
faq.a: We offer HD (the highest resolution the creator uploaded) and SD versions, both without the watermark. HD is recommended for sharing or editing.

faq.q: What formats does TokDown support?
faq.a: Videos download as MP4 (HD or SD, no watermark). Audio downloads as MP3. MP4 plays on all devices; MP3 works in any music app.

faq.q: Is it safe to use TokDown?
faq.a: Yes. TokDown runs entirely in your browser. We do not store any video files on our servers, and we never ask for your TikTok credentials. Your downloads go straight to your device.

faq.q: Why does TikTok add a watermark in the first place?
faq.a: TikTok embeds a watermark on videos saved through their native app to encourage sharing back on the platform and to brand the content. TokDown fetches the original source file before the watermark is applied, so what you get is the clean version.

faq.q: Can I download TikTok slideshows or photo posts?
faq.a: TikTok slideshows (image-based posts) work differently from videos. Support for them depends on the post type. Video posts always work; image slideshows may vary.

faq.q: Is it safe to download TikTok videos?
faq.a: Yes. TokDown never asks for your TikTok login, never stores videos on its servers, and runs entirely in your browser. Your download is a direct connection between your device and TikTok's CDN. We have no access to your TikTok account.

faq.q: How do I download TikTok without installing an app?
faq.a: Open tokdown.org in any browser on your phone or computer — Safari, Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. No app download or installation is required. Just paste the link and download.

faq.q: Can I download TikTok videos on a PC or laptop?
faq.a: Yes. Open tokdown.org in Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on Windows or Mac. Paste the TikTok link and click Download. The video saves to your Downloads folder as an MP4 file.

faq.q: Why is my downloaded TikTok video blurry?
faq.a: You most likely selected the SD option instead of HD. Go back and choose "HD · No Watermark" for the sharpest quality. Also make sure your internet connection was stable during the download — a slow connection can cause incomplete downloads.

faq.q: How long does a TikTok download take?
faq.a: Most downloads complete in 5–15 seconds. Longer videos (3–10 minutes) or slower internet connections may take up to 30 seconds. There are no queues or waiting times.

faq.q: Is downloading TikTok videos legal?
faq.a: Downloading TikTok videos for personal, non-commercial use is generally legal in most countries. What is not permitted — and can expose you to legal risk — is re-uploading, redistributing, or monetising someone else's content without their explicit permission. TokDown is intended for personal use only.

faq.q: Can I download TikTok Live streams?
faq.a: No. TikTok Live streams are broadcast in real time and are not stored as downloadable video files. Only recorded (non-live) public TikTok videos can be downloaded with TokDown.

faq.q: Does TokDown work without a TikTok account?
faq.a: Yes. TokDown only works with publicly available TikTok videos and does not require any TikTok account — yours or anyone else's. Simply paste the public video link and download.

About.metaTitle: About TokDown — Why We Built a Better TikTok Downloader
About.metaDescription: Learn why TokDown was built: a fast, honest TikTok downloader with no redirects, no stored files, and no hidden fees. We value your privacy and your time.
About.subtitle: We built TokDown because we were tired of TikTok downloaders that waste your time with fake buttons, forced redirects, and privacy nightmares.
About.story1: Most "free" TikTok downloaders have the same playbook: bury the real download button under three fake ones, redirect you through ad domains, make you solve captchas, and — some of them — even ask for your TikTok username and password. We think that is unacceptable.
About.story2: TokDown was built to be the tool we wished existed: fast, clean, and honest. You paste a link. You get your video. That's it.
About.story3: We do not store any video files on our servers. The moment you hit download, your file goes straight from TikTok's CDN to your device. We keep no record of what you downloaded, when, or from which IP address.
About.how1: When you paste a TikTok URL, TokDown resolves the video ID and fetches the available download links from TikTok's public API. We return direct links to the original video file — in the highest quality the creator uploaded — without re-encoding or compressing anything.
About.how2: The "no watermark" version is the original file as uploaded by the creator before TikTok's app overlays the logo. Both versions exist on TikTok's CDN; TokDown simply surfaces the right one.
About.how3: No video data passes through our servers. Your download is a direct connection between your device and TikTok's content delivery network.
About.legal: TokDown is intended for personal, non-commercial use only. Always respect the rights of TikTok creators — downloading a video does not transfer copyright. Do not redistribute, re-upload, or monetise downloaded content without explicit permission from the original creator. TokDown is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to TikTok or ByteDance in any way.
About.contact: Have a question, found a bug, or need to report a DMCA issue? Reach us at support@tokdown.org. We respond within 48 hours.

values.title: Privacy first
values.desc: We never store the videos you download. Files go directly from TikTok's servers to your device. We have no database of your downloads.

values.title: Speed without compromise
values.desc: Every download is processed in seconds. No queues, no "please wait" timers designed to show you more ads.

values.title: No dark patterns
values.desc: No fake download buttons, no forced redirects to ad sites, no captchas before every download. Just a clean, honest tool.

values.title: Genuinely free
values.desc: TokDown is free with no rate limits, no premium tier, and no hidden fees. We cover costs through non-intrusive advertising.

GuideNoWatermark.metaTitle: How to Download TikTok Without Watermark (iPhone, Android, PC — 2026)
GuideNoWatermark.metaDescription: Step-by-step guide: download any TikTok video without watermark in HD on iPhone, Android, Windows, or Mac. Free, no login needed. Works in 2026.
GuideNoWatermark.h1: How to Download TikTok Without Watermark
GuideNoWatermark.subtitle: A complete, honest walkthrough for iPhone, Android, Windows and Mac — including fixes for the most common problems.
GuideNoWatermark.ctaText: Ready? Try it now — no login, no limits.
GuideNoWatermark.platformsTitle: Saving to your device — by platform
GuideNoWatermark.whyTitle: Why does TikTok add a watermark?
GuideNoWatermark.why1: When you save a video using TikTok's built-in "Save video" button, TikTok overlays a watermark — your username and the TikTok logo — before saving it to your camera roll. This is intentional: it drives people who see the video elsewhere back to TikTok.
GuideNoWatermark.why2: The original video file (without watermark) is still hosted on TikTok's CDN. TokDown fetches that original file directly, bypassing the watermark entirely. The process is the same technical mechanism that TikTok's own embedding feature uses.
GuideNoWatermark.legal: Downloading TikTok videos for personal, non-commercial use is generally accepted. It is similar to taking a screenshot. What is not allowed — and can get you in legal trouble — is redistributing, re-uploading, or monetising downloaded videos without the creator's explicit permission. Always credit the original creator and respect their copyright.
GuideNoWatermark.relatedGuide1Title: How to Convert TikTok to MP3
GuideNoWatermark.relatedGuide1Desc: Extract audio from any TikTok video in seconds.
GuideNoWatermark.relatedGuide2Desc: How TokDown works and why we built it.

steps.title: Open TikTok and find the video
steps.body: Open the TikTok app on your phone, or go to tiktok.com in a browser. Scroll to — or search for — the video you want to save.

steps.title: Tap Share → Copy link
steps.body: Tap the arrow (Share) icon on the right side of the video. In the share sheet that appears, tap Copy link. The video's URL is now in your clipboard.

steps.title: Open TokDown in your browser
steps.body: Navigate to tokdown.org. The site works in any browser — Safari and Chrome on mobile, Edge or Firefox on desktop. No app download required.

steps.title: Paste the link and press Download
steps.body: Tap the input field, paste your TikTok URL, and press the Download button. TokDown fetches the video details in a few seconds.

steps.title: Click "HD · No Watermark" and save
steps.body: Once the download options appear, select "HD · No Watermark" to save the clean, high-definition version. The file saves to your Downloads folder or Files app.

platforms.tip: After the file downloads, open the Files app → Downloads, long-press the video, tap Share → Save Video to move it to your Camera Roll.
The video saves directly to your Downloads folder. Open your Gallery or Files app to find it. Some Android phones need you to grant storage permission the first time.
The file downloads to your default Downloads folder (usually C:\Users\YourName\Downloads). It plays in any media player.
The video saves to ~/Downloads. Drag it to any folder or directly into a video editing app like iMovie or CapCut.

troubleshoot.fix: Make sure the video is public. Private TikTok videos cannot be downloaded by any third-party tool. Also check that you copied the full link from the Share menu — not from the browser address bar, which may be a redirect URL.

troubleshoot.problem: Video plays but has no audio
troubleshoot.fix: This is a rare browser compatibility issue. Try right-clicking the download button and selecting "Save link as…" or try a different browser.
The creator has turned off downloads in their TikTok account settings. TokDown cannot override this restriction, as it is enforced server-side by TikTok.
This happens in some Chromium-based browsers. Rename the extension from .webm to .mp4 — the file will play normally. Or try downloading in Safari.

GuideMp3.metaTitle: TikTok to MP3 — Download TikTok Audio Free (2026)
GuideMp3.metaDescription: Convert any TikTok video to MP3 and save the audio to your phone or PC. Free, instant, no account needed. Works on iPhone, Android, Windows and Mac.
GuideMp3.h1: TikTok to MP3 — Free Audio Downloader
GuideMp3.subtitle: Extract and save the audio from any TikTok video as an MP3 file in seconds — no login, no app, works on any device.
GuideMp3.stepsTitle: How to download TikTok audio as MP3
GuideMp3.ctaText: Try it now — paste any TikTok link and download the audio.
GuideMp3.useCasesTitle: When would you want the audio only?
GuideMp3.qualityTitle: What audio quality can I expect?
GuideMp3.quality1: TikTok encodes audio at up to 128 kbps AAC. TokDown delivers the original audio stream and converts it to MP3 at the same bitrate — there is no re-encoding loss in the conversion.
GuideMp3.quality2: If the original video used music from TikTok's licensed sound library, the audio quality will be as good as the source. Voiceovers and user-recorded audio follow the same rule — quality matches what the creator recorded.
GuideMp3.copyright: Music tracks embedded in TikTok videos are usually licensed for use within TikTok only. Downloading for personal listening is generally fine. However, using downloaded audio in your own videos, streams, or commercial projects without obtaining a license is copyright infringement.
GuideMp3.copyright2: Voiceovers, original compositions, and personal recordings shared by creators are their intellectual property. Always ask permission before reusing someone else's content publicly.
GuideMp3.relatedGuide1Desc: Full HD video guide for iPhone, Android, PC and Mac.
GuideMp3.relatedGuide2Desc: How TokDown works and why we built it.

steps.title: Find the TikTok video with the audio you want
steps.body: Open the TikTok app or tiktok.com. Navigate to the video whose sound, music, or voiceover you want to save.

steps.title: Tap Share → Copy link
steps.body: Tap the Share icon (arrow) on the right side of the video. In the share sheet, tap "Copy link". The video URL is now in your clipboard.

steps.title: Open TokDown and paste the link
steps.body: Go to tokdown.org in any browser. Paste the TikTok URL into the input field and press Download. This works on mobile and desktop.

steps.title: Click "Audio MP3"
steps.body: When the download options appear, click the "Audio MP3" button. The audio file will start downloading to your device immediately.

useCases.title: Offline listening
useCases.desc: Save trending TikTok sounds to listen to on the go without needing mobile data.

useCases.title: Voiceovers & speech
useCases.desc: Extract spoken content — tutorials, advice, or commentary — to reference later.

useCases.title: Music discovery
useCases.desc: Save a track you heard on TikTok before you know the artist name, then Shazam it offline.

useCases.title: Language learning
useCases.desc: Save native-speaker audio clips for pronunciation practice or vocabulary review.

troubleshoot.fix: Make sure you copied the full TikTok share link, not a shortened or redirect URL. Try the Share → Copy link flow again.
Some TikTok videos are silent (original creator did not use audio). Confirm the video has audio before downloading. Also check your device volume.
This happens in Safari on iPhone. The audio is the same quality — just rename the extension to .mp3 and it will work in any player.
TikTok videos can be up to 10 minutes. If the video itself is very long, ensure your download completed fully. A slow connection can cause partial downloads.

GuideIphone.metaTitle: How to Download TikTok Videos on iPhone — Save to Camera Roll (2026)
GuideIphone.metaDescription: Save any TikTok video to your iPhone Camera Roll without watermark. Step-by-step guide for iOS Safari — no app install, no account, free.
GuideIphone.h1: How to Download TikTok on iPhone
GuideIphone.subtitle: Save any TikTok video to your Camera Roll in HD — without the watermark, without an app, without a TikTok account. Works in Safari on every iPhone.
GuideIphone.stepsTitle: Step-by-step: download TikTok to iPhone Camera Roll
GuideIphone.ctaText: Ready to try? Paste any TikTok link below — no login needed.

steps.title: Open TikTok and find the video
steps.body: Open the TikTok app on your iPhone and scroll to — or search for — the video you want to save.

steps.title: Tap Share → Copy Link
steps.body: Tap the Share icon (the arrow pointing right) on the right side of the video. In the share sheet, tap "Copy link". The video URL is now in your clipboard.

steps.title: Open Safari and go to TokDown
steps.body: Open Safari on your iPhone. Type tokdown.org in the address bar. Tap the input field and paste the TikTok link (long-press → Paste).

steps.title: Tap Download and choose HD
steps.body: Tap the Download button. When the options appear, tap "HD · No Watermark" to download the clean, high-definition version.

steps.title: Save to Camera Roll from Files
steps.body: On iPhone, downloaded files go to the Files app. Open Files → Downloads. Long-press the video file and tap Share → "Save Video". The video moves to your Photos Camera Roll.

tips.title: Use Safari, not the TikTok in-app browser
tips.body: TikTok's built-in browser blocks downloads. Always open tokdown.org in Safari (the blue compass icon) — not inside TikTok itself.

tips.title: iOS 16+ has a Download button in Safari
tips.body: On iOS 16 and later, Safari shows a download progress indicator in the toolbar. Tap it to see your downloaded file immediately.

tips.title: Set your default download location
tips.body: Go to Settings → Safari → Downloads and set it to "On My iPhone" so files are easy to find in the Files app.

tips.title: No daily limit
tips.body: TokDown has no download limit. Open each TikTok link in a new Safari tab and move all files to Camera Roll afterward.

troubleshoot.fix: Make sure the video is public. Also check that you copied the full link from Share → Copy Link — not from the browser address bar.

troubleshoot.problem: "Save Video" option not visible in the share sheet
troubleshoot.fix: Scroll down in the share sheet — the option may be below the fold. Also make sure the file is a valid .mp4 and that Photos access is granted in Settings → Privacy → Photos.

troubleshoot.problem: Video file saves as .webm or won't play
troubleshoot.fix: On iPhone this is rare. Rename the extension to .mp4 in the Files app: long-press the file → Rename → change the extension.
HD TikTok files can be 20–80 MB. Switch to Wi-Fi for faster downloads.

GuideAndroid.metaTitle: How to Download TikTok Videos on Android — Save to Gallery (2026)
GuideAndroid.metaDescription: Download any TikTok video to your Android phone gallery without watermark — Samsung, Xiaomi, Huawei and all Android brands. Free, HD, no app needed.
GuideAndroid.h1: How to Download TikTok on Android
GuideAndroid.subtitle: Save any TikTok video to your Android gallery in HD — no watermark, no app install, no account. Works on Samsung, Xiaomi, Huawei, and all Android brands.
GuideAndroid.stepsTitle: Step-by-step: download TikTok to Android gallery
GuideAndroid.ctaText: Ready? Paste any TikTok link and save it to your gallery.

steps.title: Open TikTok and find the video
steps.body: Open the TikTok app and navigate to the video you want to save.

steps.title: Tap Share → Copy Link
steps.body: Tap the Share icon (the arrow) on the right side of the video. In the share sheet, tap "Copy link". The video URL is in your clipboard.

steps.title: Open Chrome and go to TokDown
steps.body: Open Chrome on your Android phone. Go to tokdown.org and tap the input field. Paste the TikTok link (long-press → Paste).

steps.title: Tap Download and choose HD
steps.body: Tap the Download button. When options appear, tap "HD · No Watermark".

steps.title: Find the video in your Gallery
steps.body: The video saves directly to your Downloads folder. Open your Gallery app or Files app to find and play it.

tips.title: Grant storage permission the first time
tips.body: On Android 12 and below, Chrome may ask for storage permission on the first download. Tap "Allow" to enable saving files.

tips.title: Samsung Gallery picks it up automatically
tips.body: On Samsung devices, downloaded videos appear in the Gallery app under the Downloads album immediately after saving.

tips.title: Xiaomi / MIUI users
tips.body: On Xiaomi phones, use the built-in browser or Chrome. The video saves to Downloads and appears in the Photos app under Albums → Downloads.

tips.title: Share directly from the download notification
tips.body: After the download completes, Android shows a notification with the file. Tap it to open the video, or long-press to share it directly to WhatsApp, Telegram, or other apps.

troubleshoot.problem: Download starts but file is 0 bytes
troubleshoot.fix: This usually happens on slow connections. Try again on Wi-Fi. Also check that you have enough storage space on your device.
Open the Files app and check the Downloads folder manually. Some Android versions require you to wait a moment for the media scanner to index the new file.

troubleshoot.problem: Chrome asks to open with an external app
troubleshoot.fix: Tap "Download" instead of opening. If you see a prompt, select "Download file" to save it to your device rather than streaming it.
This warning appears for some file types. Tap "Download anyway" — TokDown only serves standard MP4 and MP3 files.
